procs.title: Test

steps.text: Mettre ces outils sur la table de travail

procs.genText:
I. Tool Preparation  
1. Place these tools on the work table (see photo)  
2. Ensure all tools are clean and in good condition (see photo)  

II. Electronic Board Preparation  
1. Inspect the electronic board for any defects or damages.  
2. Ensure all components are correctly placed on the board.  
3. Secure the board in a static-free environment.  

III. Testing Procedure  
1. Connect the electronic board to the testing equipment.  
2. Power on the testing equipment and the electronic board.  
3. Monitor the readings and document any anomalies.  
4. Disconnect the electronic board once testing is complete.
